metadata.description: Operations-analysis method pack: skills, role agents, data-hygiene rules and artifact templates for industrial engineering and supply-chain work

plugins.name: industrial-engineering-ai-skills
plugins.description: An operations-analysis method for AI agents: OTIF audits, forecast accuracy reviews, ABC-XYZ segmentation, safety-stock stress tests, Pareto discipline and reporting contracts - with role agents, always-on data-hygiene rules and artifact templates. Pitfalls included.
